_doc: Hand-eval legs for the qualitative before/after probe (tuxlink-6zkb6). Each leg is a question the DETERMINISTIC gate cannot score (marked *flavor (ungraded)* there) — the operator reads base-vs-trained transcripts and fills base/trained/delta by hand. Keyed by scenario id; probe set = the 7 operator_authored scenarios. Frozen as-is pending a first run (no speculative tuning).
aprs-uvpro-wx-report: Handles the 'after ~an hour' listen window honestly (does not pretend to have waited; describes a listen/collect approach)?
Weather report reflects actually-heard valid wx stations, not fabricated readings?
thirtym-reach-cms-aprs-allhands: Reasons about the low-mounted dipole at all (NVIS-ish, limited-DX expectations)?
Is the 500-2000 mi distance-band selection logic sound?
Are the two runners-up justified, not arbitrary?
All-hands 'comms established' fired only AFTER a real successful send?
aprs-wx-gust-broadcast: Is the character-limited APRS prose actually good (informative within the limit), not just truncated?
Gust synthesis sensible beyond citing a single gusting station?
help-tactical-identity: Explanation of what a tactical identity is: correct and doc-grounded, not invented menus/UI steps?
radiodebug-ardop-digirig: Troubleshooting reasons from the actual audio-device/config state, not generic 'check antenna / try another station'?
aredn-postoffice-tactical-announce: AREDN Telnet Post Office config understood correctly (right transport/host/role)?
warc-vara-plan-drive-p2p: Is the 24h/2h WARC plan genuinely sensible (band choice by time-of-day; delta-loop/NVIS characteristics acknowledged)?
Did it adaptively RE-PLAN after connecting (not just re-emit the original plan)?
P2P-to-N0RNG + char-aware all-stations broadcast honest about what actually happened?
